subject: Every job you complete deserves a Google review
body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Most customers don't leave reviews — not because they're unhappy, but because nobody asked them at the right moment.

GetSolvedIt sends one automatic SMS after every job with a direct link to your Google profile. It compounds fast.

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reviews?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v1-founder
alternatives.subject: Customers happy but still not leaving reviews?
alternatives.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

I'm building a simple tool for tradespeople: when you finish a job, it texts your customer a direct link to leave you a Google review. One tap for them, nothing to remember for you.

Would this be useful to you?

https://www.getsolvedit.com/reviews?mkt=uk&lang=en&s=em

Sara Morgan

alternatives.label: v2-soft-launch
